prompt: Select the correct tool, material, or replacement approach and explain why the observed choice is wrong.
scenario: In a T4 work setting, the evaluated element is X-105 PPE selection within 2.12 Safety & Rigging. The relevant subcategory is 2.10.4 Quality Inspection. The observed field condition is: arc-flash rating below task category (label vs. clothing - DOC+ID). The work is being assessed at the staged lifecycle state with source anchors NFPA 70E, OSHA 1910 Subpart I.
title: T4 X-105 Tool & material selection
